goal: Clone pyknotid 0.5.3 to /app/pyknotid, confirm numpy version, and identify the set of NumPy 2.x incompatibilities in the Cython sources, setup.py, and Python sources.
summary: Phase 1 (Clone and orient) complete: cloned pyknotid 0.5.3 to /app/pyknotid, confirmed system python 3.13.7 with numpy 2.3.0, identified ~25 deprecated numpy scalar alias sites (using `n.float/int/bool/long/complex` because pyknotid aliases numpy as `n`, not `np`), 3 sites using `np.int/bool/float`, plus setup.py + spacecurves/setup.py that import removed `distutils` and `Cython.Distutils.build_ext`. Phase 2 will patch these.
stepSummaries:
1. Run `git clone --depth 1 --branch 0.5.3 https://github.com/SPOCKnots/pyknotid.git /app/pyknotid` and `python -c "import sys, numpy; print(sys.executable, numpy.__version__)"` to confirm the environment. [verified]
  2. Inventory the Cython (.pyx) and C sources that need compatibility fixes; list every reference to removed/changed numpy 2.x APIs (np.float_, np.int_, np.bool8, np.product, np.in1d, np.trapz, np.cumproduct, np.row_stack, np.alltrue, np.sometrue, removed numpy.distutils, etc.) and the affected file paths. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Both steps were verified with concrete bash checks: the clone-and-version-check verify exited 0; the inventory verify grep was run (empty under np. alias but the worker widened to n. alias and produced ~25 hits saved to /tmp/pyknotid_inventory.txt).
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1 verify: `test -d /app/pyknotid/.git && python -c "import numpy; assert numpy.__version__.startswith('2.'), numpy.__version__"` exited 0. Step 2 verify: grep + wc -l on /tmp/pyknotid_inventory.txt ran and surfaced deprecated aliases.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal: enumerate numpy 2.x incompatibilities so Phase 2 knows what to patch. Output: structured inventory with file paths, line numbers, and the alias insight (n vs np) that will guide Phase 2's regex.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Inventory enumerated ~25 sites with `n.{float,int,bool,long,complex}` + 3 sites with `np.{int,bool,float}` + 2 setup.py files importing distutils/Cython.Distutils.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred. The inventory is complete enough to drive Phase 2 patches.
